problem_statement: How to reliably verify LLM-generated code (adaptation managers in Collective Adaptive Systems) via automated feedback loops when the code is never manually inspected because the specifier is a domain expert who cannot read code.
insufficiency_evidence: Metrics-only feedback often stalls: it indicates failure but does not specify which part of the multi-step strategy is broken; a vibe-coded AM 'might compile, run, and still systematically fail'
solution_mechanisms: automated feedback-loop verification without human inspection
runtime constraint verifier as automated reviewer
multi-run test suite over varied seeds/initial states
